zh.lifeSummary: William Stansfield是Henry Stansfeld和Dionys de Thornhill的兒子，於1320年8月1日出生在英國越可爾恩爾。他於1350年與Joan Burton在英國越可爾哈利法可哈利法可 聖 詹姆斯結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1372年1月在英國越可爾史坦菲爾德享年51歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: William Stansfield是Henry Stansfeld和Dionys de Thornhill的儿子，于1320年8月1日出生在英国越可爾恩爾。他于1350年与Joan Burton在英国越可爾哈利法可哈利法可 聖 詹姆斯结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1372年1月在英国越可爾史坦菲爾德享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: Stansfield
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): habitational name from Stansfield (Yorkshire) and Stansfield in Rochdale (Lancashire). The placenames may derive from an Old English personal name Stān (genitive Stānes) + Old English feld ‘open country’. However, there is little evidence to support the suggestion that such a personal name may have existed, and the initial element may be Old English stānes, genitive of stān ‘stone, rock’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: William Stansfield was born on 1 August 1320, in Thornhill, Yorkshire, England as the son of Henry Stansfeld and Dionys de Thornhill. He married Joan Burton in 1350, in Halifax St James, Halifax, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. He died in January 1372, in Stansfield, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 51.

Il a épousé Joan Burton en 1350, à Halifax St James, Halifax, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en janvier 1372, à Stansfield, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 51 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: William Stansfieldは1320年8月1日にイギリスヨークシュアイアソルンヒルでHenry StansfeldとDionys de Thornhillの息子として生まれた。1350年にイギリスヨークシュアイアハリファックスハリファックス スト ジャムスでJoan Burtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1372年1月にイギリスヨークシュアイアスタンスフィールドで51歳で死去した。

ko.Stansfield, Halifax, Yorkshire, England: 영국 요르크실르 할이파스 할이파스 스트 자메스
ko.lifeSummary: William Stansfield(은)는 1320년 8월 1일 영국 요르크실르 토른힐에서 Henry Stansfeld(와)과 Dionys de Thornhill의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1350년 영국 요르크실르 할이파스 할이파스 스트 자메스에서 Joan Burton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1372년 1월 영국 요르크실르 스탠스필드에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Stansfield, Halifax, Yorkshire, England: хэлифакс ст джемесь, хэлифакс, еркшир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: William Stansfield родился 1 августа 1320 г. в местности таурнилл, еркшир, Англия. Его родителей звали Henry Stansfeld и Dionys de Thornhill. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Burton в 1350 г. в местности хэлифакс ст джемесь, хэлифакс, еркшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Он умер январь 1372 г. в местности стансфиелд, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 51 год.
